customManagers.description: VERSION holds the Hesk version, tracked against the legacy download archive: the newest version there is the newest the build can fetch (current releases sit behind a human-gated form until superseded, so tracking hesk.com/version or the changelog would propose versions the build cannot download).

packageRules.description: The archive page is HTML: plain format yields whitespace tokens, and each token carrying a dotted version is a release candidate
